items.title: “Investment activity remained subdued, particularly in the European automotive industry. US tariff policy further increased uncertainty with our customers, leading to delayed investment decisions in various markets and regions,”
“That will be my target this year. I will be chasing my fourth gold in Ghana,”

«Insbesondere in der europäischen Automobilindustrie blieb die Investitionstätigkeit weiterhin verhalten. Die US-amerikanische Zollpolitik verstärkte die Unsicherheit bei unserer Kundschaft zusätzlich und führte dazu, dass Investitionsentscheidungen in verschiedenen Märkten und Regionen verzögert wurden»

Die US-amerikanische Zollpolitik verstärkte die Unsicherheit bei unserer Kundschaft zusätzlich und führte dazu, dass Investitionsentscheidungen in verschiedenen Märkten und Regionen verzögert wurden»

«In stretta collaborazione con Alarm Phone e con le missioni aeree civili nel Mediterraneo Centrale, la nostra Ong attiva il suo team di monitoraggio della situazione in mare anche quando non siamo direttamente presenti in navigazione con i nostri assetti»

“The research on the fishing sector in Eritrea presented within the framework of AquaFarm 2026 was chosen for the unique characteristics of this country, characterized by a long coastline, a great availability of fish and a need for technology that Italy can offer,” “We therefore believe that our country is the best partner for Eritrea, not only for our high level of experience and capacity for technological innovation, but also for our know-how in small and medium-scale fishing. With this double value, we can truly offer Eritrea a possibility for development, for the improvement of fishing conditions, and for the living conditions of the population”
„Dass wir hier erneut ein gesundes Jungtier willkommen heißen dürfen, ist ein wichtiger Schritt für den Erhalt dieser faszinierenden Art.“
“I have to confess I never felt there was any kind of loss in terms of managing the locker room,”
«Uno dei ricordi più cari che ho di Francesca Carabellese, nostra indimenticabile spalla, è l’ultimo concerto che facemmo insieme nel 2024, poco prima che ci lasciasse»
“Il lavoro a distanza può diventare una politica per la famiglia”
„Doch ich brauche Geduld, kann noch nicht auf 100 Prozent gehen.“
